name: loopkit
description: Use LoopOps' hosted MCP read surface and harness-first workflow from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Diagnose bounded telemetry and close improvement loops
interface.longDescription: LoopOps gives Codex an agent-first telemetry read surface: discover projects, diagnose bounded evidence windows, inspect sessions, record loop lifecycle events, and verify whether the next window improved while keeping external writes approval-gated.
defaultPrompt: Use LoopOps to diagnose the latest telemetry window.
Find recurring product pain and draft a patch plan.
Verify whether this loop improved after shipping.
